title: Pricing details - Healthcare agent service
display_title: Estimate healthcare agent service costs by action usage
description: This page provides information about the healthcare agent service pricing
summary:
This article describes the rates for the different features and capabilities used in the healthcare agent service, which are charged to the pay-as-you-go meter.
Healthcare agent service leverages "Actions" as the unit that measures agent usage. The total cost is calculated based on the sum of the Actions used by your organization.
The number of Actions consumed by an agent depends on the design of the agent, how often customers interact with it, and the features they use.
classification_reason: Pricing details with action-based metering and tiered rates directly support cost and usage decision-making.

User data is maintained between conversations. There are five types of variables
